branch_lock_condition: Branch is PROVISIONAL: locked only once the adaptive GCG-against-the-probe bench (M1/M2, same GPU seam) confirms N/N−; until then the committed branch is the hard-F default (oracle frontier, H6-A).
max_batch_note: max_candidate_batch is a 24 GB VRAM ceiling (hardware characterisation), NOT branch-critical (DB-3): the compute branch stays provisional + hard-F default regardless.
